confirm.title: Confirm Deye Inverter
confirm.description: Found device "{name}". Enter the logger serial number (printed on the unit).

abort.no_devices_found: No Deye inverter found nearby. Make sure Bluetooth is enabled on the inverter.

data.dry_run: Dry run (log writes without touching the inverter)

data_description.keepalive: Reuse a single BLE link instead of reconnecting every poll. Reduces the reconnect churn that can hang the logger, but holds an ESP proxy connection slot and blocks the phone app (one central at a time). Leave off unless Home Assistant owns the Bluetooth link.
